## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [conventional commit](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages) format
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] Breaking changes are noted with `!` in commit type (e.g. `feat!:`) and described below
